description_long: This is a small, modern dry cleaning storefront with a simple rectangular structure and a flat roof. The facade is mostly dark, with a prominent black exterior and a minimalistic design. At the center of the front, there is a small, light-colored sign or panel, possibly indicating the business name, and a blue accent that may represent a logo or decorative element. The building appears to have a single main entrance, but there are no large windows or visible display racks from the outside. The overall appearance is sleek and understated, with a focus on clean lines and a compact footprint. The structure is likely constructed from metal or composite panels, giving it a hard, smooth surface.
description: A compact, modern dry cleaning storefront with a black exterior, minimal signage, and a sleek, flat-roofed design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade, a small central sign, and a blue accent, with no visible windows or racks.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the flat roof and the continuation of the black exterior panels.
description_view_2: Rear or opposite side view, mostly featureless with the black surface dominating the appearance.
description_view_3: Side view showing the depth of the building and the minimalistic design, with the sign and blue accent less visible.
